subject: English

lesson.story_mission: Join the Opinion Orchard crew to turn clear ideas into Grade 2 paragraphs.
lesson.objective: I can state an opinion, give reasons, and provide a closing.
lesson.concept_explanation: Writers plan one clear idea, add connected details, and finish with a sentence that sounds complete.
lesson.common_misconception: Writers may give an answer without enough parts for the writing purpose.
lesson.real_world_connection: Clear writing helps classmates understand book choices, science facts, and real events.
lesson.lesson_summary: Plan the parts, write complete sentences, and reread with the checklist.
lesson.mini_lesson: Say the goal, choose strong details, then write sentences with capitals, spaces, and punctuation.

worked_examples.text: Watch: Plan the parts before you write the paragraph.
Demo: Reread the draft with the writing checklist.

hint_ladder: Use the visual model to plan your answer.
Check capitals, spaces, and punctuation before you finish.

guided_practice.prompt: Which sentence states an opinion about recess?
guided_practice.correct_answer: Recess is the best part of the school day.
hints: Read the writing goal carefully.
Use the visual model to plan your answer.
Check capitals, spaces, and punctuation before you finish.
guided_practice.explanation: The answer fits the writing target and stays on topic.
guided_practice.feedback: Good writing move — it matches the checklist.
choices: Recess is the best part of the school day.
Recess can be found at school.
Recess starts with a letter.
guided_practice.opinion: Recess is the best part of the school day.
guided_practice.reason: because kids can move and play with friends.
guided_practice.closing: That is why recess is important.

guided_practice.prompt: Which sentence states an opinion about library day?

Use the visual model to plan your answer.
Check capitals, spaces, and punctuation before you finish.
guided_practice.explanation: The answer fits the writing target and stays on topic.
guided_practice.feedback: Good writing move — it matches the checklist.
choices: Library day is my favorite school day.
Library Day can be found at school.
Library Day starts with a letter.
guided_practice.opinion: Library day is my favorite school day.
guided_practice.reason: because we can choose new books to read.
guided_practice.closing: That is why library day is special.

game_theme.title: Write Opinion Pieces Skill World
game_theme.mission_intro: Build writing power by practicing state an opinion, give reasons, and provide a closing.

level_banks.label: Level 1: State an Opinion
level_banks.focus: Identify sentences that tell what a writer thinks or prefers.
